steps.title: Interpret the growth factor
steps.content:
When an amount increases by 60%, the new value equals the old value plus 60% of the old value:
$$\text{New} = \text{old} + 0.60 \times \text{old} = \text{old} \times 1.60$$
This multiplication by 1.60 occurs every 2 days. (The choice with 0.60 is a distractor representing a 60% decrease, not increase.)

steps.title: Build the exponential model
steps.content:
Growth happens every 2 days, so the number of growth periods in x days is $\frac{x}{2}$.
Each period multiplies the views by 1.60.
Starting from 233 views on day 0:
$$f(x) = 233 \times (1.60)^{x/2}$$
This matches choice C — C is correct.
